scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

rules: No Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serifs for headings.
Headlines must use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Variable weights applied for typographic tension (e.g., extremely light vs. black).
95% of UI is monochrome. Color is purely functional.
Signal Red (#FF3B30) used EXCLUSIVELY for overdue reminders and 'nagging' states.
International Klein Blue (#002FA7) used for AI interaction states and active pipeline links.

grids.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6
grids.kanban: flex flex-row overflow-x-auto gap-4 pb-4 snap-x

rules: Expose the skeleton: Use visible 1px borders between dashboard grid items (border-collapse look).
Padding inside bordered containers must be generous (p-6 or p-8) to prevent collision.
Optical alignment: Use tight padding on text-only elements, adjust icon paddings visually.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid background, 1px solid border (border-black/10), NO shadow. Hover state: border darkens to border-black/40.
surface_strategies.modals_sidebars: Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-2xl with 1px inner border-white/40.
surface_strategies.chat_input: Floating sticky bottom or fixed sidebar, crisp 1px border, stark white background, inner shadow for depth.
surface_strategies.buttons: Brutalist block: Pure black or solid red, sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), heavy text contrast.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-black/80 transition-colors
buttons.alert: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-semibold shadow-sm hover:bg-[#D32F2F] transition-colors

kanban_board.column: w-80 flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col gap-3 snap-start
kanban_board.card: border border-border/40 bg-white p-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-black/40 transition-colors flex flex-col gap-2
kanban_board.labels: Mono-weight uppercase tags for fast scanning

ai_chat_input.container: sticky bottom-6 mx-auto w-full max-w-3xl bg-white border border-black/10 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] p-2 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-2
ai_chat_input.submit_button: bg-black text-white rounded-lg p-3 hover:scale-105 transition-transform

timeline.node: absolute -left-1.5 w-3 h-3 bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-full

rules: Use Shadcn UI primarily, but strip rounded borders down to rounded-sm or rounded-none for the Swiss Brutalist feel.
Tables: Clean, border-b only, hover state bg-black/5.

motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:ring-offset-2.
motion_and_interactions.kanban_drag: Scale card slightly (scale-105) and apply drop-shadow-xl while dragging.
motion_and_interactions.ai_processing: Instead of a generic spinner, use a tracing beam or text shimmer effect (International Klein Blue) on the input border.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA minimums. Signal Red text on White bg is valid. Grey text must be at least text-muted-foreground.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='chat-submit-btn').
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the AI processing animations.

icons_and_media.icon_style: Use sharp, linear icons with 1.5px to 2px stroke width.

logo_placeholder.description: Abstract glass reflection suitable for a placeholder logo mark.

rules: Rely primarily on typography and data visualization rather than photos.
User avatars can default to stylized initials with pure black background and white text.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Ensure 'Cabinet Grotesk' is loaded for headers and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text via Google Fonts or standard imports.
2. Implement the AI Chat input as the primary interface for data entry, fixed at the bottom or taking a prominent top widget slot.
3. Use the 'nagging_alert' (#FF3B30) color prominently for the 'Overdue follow-ups dashboard'. It should scream for attention against the monochrome background.
4. Overwrite Shadcn default Card and Button components to remove large border radii (use max 4px / rounded-sm) and soft shadows.
5. Ensure the Kanban board has 'overflow-x-auto' with snap scrolling for a smooth pipeline view.
6. Build a persistent right-side panel or dense dialog for the 'Lead Detail View', showing the activity timeline.
7. Do NOT generate new images, rely on the strict Swiss monochrome visual language.
